// LeyLineLedgerSettings: Reading order: below this line, every // key is documentation; the next block lists real settings in the same order. LeyLineLedger routes vendor trade and pyreals through bank-style PropertyInt64 storage, optional luminance gem withdrawal, death bank tax, and currency denomination tables. Items and Currencies arrays: each element is an object with // lines first, then Name/Id/Prop or Name/Id/Value (same order).
// VendorsUseBank: When true, vendor buy/sell uses bank balances instead of only inventory pyreals.
// DirectDeposit: When true, incoming currency can deposit directly per mod rules.
// AccountWideBank: When true, standard (non–challenge) characters share bank balances per account (account id > guid > name). Challenge characters use per-character bank until merge on /cm quit or HC permadeath.
// MaxCoinsDropped: Cap on physical coin stacks dropped as change; 0 uses mod default behavior.
// Items: Non-pyreal bankables: each entry maps a WCID to a character PropertyInt64 for stored amount. Inside each item: // lines first, then Name, Id, Prop (same order).
// ExcessSetToMax: When true, amounts above limits are clamped to the cap instead of failing.
// LuminanceProperty: Character biota PropertyInt64 id for banked luminance.
// CashProperty: Character biota PropertyInt64 id for banked pyreals; align with AutoLoot BankCashProperty if used (default 39999).
// LuminanceGemWeenieClassId: /bank withdraw luminance creates this gem WCID carrying banked luminance; 0 disables. Default 7897 is stock ACE Black Garnet.
// LuminanceGemStoredAmountProperty: PropertyInt64 on the gem item storing credited luminance on use; pick an unused id for your shard.
// DeathBankPyrealPercent: On death, remove floor(banked × percent / 100) pyreals from bank; 0 = no loss.
// DeathBankPyrealMaxLossPerDeath: 0 = unlimited. When > 0, caps pyreals removed per death after percent.
// Currencies: Pyreal denomination table: WCID and Value per unit for making change. Inside each entry: // lines first, then Name, Id, Value (same order).

SalvageBank.// Enabled: When true, /bank salvage lists or deposits salvage units per DepositRules.
SalvageBank.// FirstMaterialBankPropertyId: Base PropertyInt64 for row 0; row i uses this + i unless the rule sets BankProperty. Reserve FirstMaterialBankPropertyId .. + DepositRules.Count.
SalvageBank.// LegacyPooledSalvagePropertyToClear: Former single-pool prop (default 40200). If > 0, leftover balance is zeroed on next /bank salvage use. Set to 0 after all characters migrated.
SalvageBank.// DepositRules: WCID → units per item consumed from inventory (full stacks). Deposit accepts WeenieClassId plus OutputBagWeenieClassId (if set and different) and AdditionalDepositWeenieClassIds (e.g. full-bag 29576 for granite).
SalvageBank.// Redeem: Global defaults; per-material redeem can override bag WCID per DepositRules row.
SalvageBank.// ShowWcidsInSalvageStatus: When true, status always shows [WCID n] after each material name.
SalvageBank.// SalvageStatusWcidsTogglePropertyId: Unused PropertyInt id (e.g. 40190) for per-player WCID display: /bank salvage debug toggles 0/1. 0 = no toggle (names only unless ShowWcidsInSalvageStatus).
SalvageBank.// DirectDepositOnSalvage: When true, recipe-created salvage stacks (bench, tinkering, etc.) credit the LeyLineLedger salvage bank instead of your pack.

Redeem.// Enabled: When true, /bank salvage redeem creates bags at UnitsPerBag units each.
Redeem.// UnitsPerBag: Fixed ratio: banked units debited per bag (e.g. 100).
Redeem.// OutputWorkmanship: 1–10 sets ACE Workmanship on the created bag; 0 = weenie default.

HouseStorage.// Enabled: When true, /house upgrade storage debits MMD + Writ from bank with confirmation.
HouseStorage.// BonusSlotsProperty: PropertyInt total bonus slots purchased (for external hooks).

Tiers.// SlotsAdded: Extra inventory slots this upgrade represents.
Extra inventory slots this upgrade represents.
